description_long: This is a rustic wooden bucket with vertical wooden staves bound together by two dark metal hoops, one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood appears weathered and aged, with a range of light to medium brown tones and visible grain patterns. The bucket features a pair of sturdy, curved metal bail handles attached to opposite sides, allowing for easy carrying. The interior is open and hollow, with the same wood texture visible inside, and the top rim is unevenly cut, giving it a hand-crafted appearance. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for carrying water or other materials in an urban or garden setting.
description: A weathered wooden bucket with metal hoops and curved metal handles, featuring an open top and rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden staves, metal hoops, and open top with no handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the curved metal handles attached to the upper hoop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both metal handles in a resting position against the bucket's sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other metal handle prominently visible and attached to the upper hoop.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
